```{r paper-figure, eval=have_pip_records, fig.width=16, fig.height=22}
      basin_drift = .data$weighted_r2_drift
    )

  jsd_long_pf <- pip_drift_summary %>%
    dplyr::filter(.data$pair_kind %in% c("vanilla_to_treatment",
                                          "vanilla_to_warm")) %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      dataset_bundle_id = as.character(.data$dataset_bundle_id),
      chain = .data$chain,
      pair_kind = dplyr::if_else(
        .data$pair_kind == "vanilla_to_treatment", "cold_ann", "cold_warm"
      ),
      pip_jsd = .data$pip_jsd
    )

  basin_wide_pf <- basin_long_pf %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = chain, values_from = basin_drift,
                       names_prefix = "basin_")

  jsd_wide_pf <- jsd_long_pf %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = chain, values_from = pip_jsd,
                       names_prefix = "jsd_")

  joined_pf <- basin_wide_pf %>%
    dplyr::inner_join(jsd_wide_pf, by = c("dataset_bundle_id", "pair_kind"))

  # Axis maxes (square plots, both chains share scale).
  basin_max_pf <- max(0.05,
    max(joined_pf$basin_mu, joined_pf$basin_pi, na.rm = TRUE))
  jsd_max_pf <- max(0.05,
    max(joined_pf$jsd_mu, joined_pf$jsd_pi, na.rm = TRUE))

  # Color limits (must match within each pair so the collected legend is
  # consistent). Color uses mu-side values across BOTH cold->ann and
  # cold->warm subsets, so we take the max across the full joined table.
  basin_color_max <- max(joined_pf$basin_mu, na.rm = TRUE)
  jsd_color_max   <- max(joined_pf$jsd_mu,   na.rm = TRUE)

  # Sub-panel builder. Color is linear viridis (no log). Endpoint labels
  # carry the intuition ("no change" -> "most change") so the reader
  # doesn't need to read raw values off the legend bar.
  #
  # coord_cartesian + theme(aspect.ratio = 1) decouples the panel's
  # on-screen square size from the data range, so basin (0-0.8) and
  # JSD (0-1.7) panels render at the same physical size.
  make_b_panel <- function(df, x_col, y_col, color_col,
                           x_label, y_label, color_title, title_lab,
                           color_lim_max, max_val,
                           show_y = TRUE) {
    ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[x_col]], y = .data[[y_col]],
                   color = .data[[color_col]])) +
      geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0,
                  color = "grey50", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.35) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.58, size = 1.35, stroke = 0) +
      scale_color_viridis_c(
        option = "C",
        limits = c(0, color_lim_max),
        breaks = c(0, color_lim_max),
        labels = c("no change", "most change"),
        guide = guide_colorbar(
          title.position = "top",
          title.hjust = 0.5,
          barwidth  = grid::unit(5.3, "cm"),
          barheight = grid::unit(0.35, "cm"),
          direction = "horizontal"
        )
      ) +
      scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.015, 0.035))) +
      scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.015, 0.035))) +
      coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, max_val), ylim = c(0, max_val),
                      expand = FALSE) +
      labs(x = x_label, y = y_label, color = color_title,
           title = title_lab) +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 10.5, face = "bold",
                                  margin = margin(b = 4)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10, margin = margin(t = 5)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10, margin = margin(r = 5)),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 8.5, color = "grey25"),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey90", linewidth = 0.3),
        panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "grey95", linewidth = 0.2),
        legend.margin = margin(t = -2, b = -2),
        plot.margin = margin(3, 6, 3, 6),
        aspect.ratio = 1
      ) +
      {
        if (show_y) {
          theme()
        } else {
          theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(),
                axis.text.y = element_blank(),
                axis.ticks.y = element_blank())
        }
      }
  }

  joined_pf_cold_ann  <- joined_pf %>% dplyr::filter(pair_kind == "cold_ann")
  joined_pf_cold_warm <- joined_pf %>% dplyr::filter(pair_kind == "cold_warm")

  # Color title is shared across each pair via plot_layout(guides="collect").
  basin_color_title <- expression(paste("PIP JSD (", mu, ")"))
  jsd_color_title   <- expression(paste("Basin drift (", mu, ")"))

  pB1 <- make_b_panel(
    joined_pf_cold_ann, "basin_mu", "basin_pi", "jsd_mu",
    expr_basin_x, expr_basin_y, basin_color_title,
    "B(i). Cold -> annotated",
    color_lim_max = jsd_color_max, max_val = basin_max_pf,
    show_y = TRUE
  )
  pB2 <- make_b_panel(
    joined_pf_cold_warm, "basin_mu", "basin_pi", "jsd_mu",
    expr_basin_x, expr_basin_y, basin_color_title,
    "B(ii). Cold -> warm vanilla",
    color_lim_max = jsd_color_max, max_val = basin_max_pf,
    show_y = FALSE
  )
  pB3 <- make_b_panel(
    joined_pf_cold_ann, "jsd_mu", "jsd_pi", "basin_mu",
    expr_jsd_x, expr_jsd_y, jsd_color_title,
    "B(iii). Cold -> annotated",
    color_lim_max = basin_color_max, max_val = jsd_max_pf,
    show_y = TRUE
  )
  pB4 <- make_b_panel(
    joined_pf_cold_warm, "jsd_mu", "jsd_pi", "basin_mu",
    expr_jsd_x, expr_jsd_y, jsd_color_title,
    "B(iv). Cold -> warm vanilla",
    color_lim_max = basin_color_max, max_val = jsd_max_pf,
    show_y = FALSE
  )

  # A 2 x 2 two-pair layout gives the four scatters much more physical area
  # than the old 1 x 4 strip. Within each row-pair, the left plot carries
  # the shared y-axis label and the right plot drops duplicate y text.
  basin_pair_B <- (pB1 | pB2) +
    plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = c(1, 1)) +
    plot_annotation(title = "B. Basin drift: mu vs pi") &
    theme(
      legend.position  = "bottom",
      legend.direction = "horizontal",
      legend.box       = "horizontal",
      legend.title     = element_text(size = 9.5),
      legend.text      = element_text(size = 8.5),
      plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11,
                                      margin = margin(b = 5))
    )

  jsd_pair_B <- (pB3 | pB4) +
    plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = c(1, 1)) +
    plot_annotation(title = "PIP JSD: mu vs pi") &
    theme(
      legend.position  = "bottom",
      legend.direction = "horizontal",
      legend.box       = "horizontal",
      legend.title     = element_text(size = 9.5),
      legend.text      = element_text(size = 8.5),
      plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11,
                                      margin = margin(b = 5))
    )

  panel_B <- (basin_pair_B / jsd_pair_B) +
    plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1))

  # ============================================================
  # PANEL C. dAUPRC boxplots by 3-bucket basin-drift cut
  # ============================================================
  auprc_lookup_pf <- auprc_per_dataset %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      dataset_bundle_id = as.character(.data$dataset_bundle_id),
      delta_mu_treat = .data$auprc_delta_mu,
      delta_mu_warm  = .data$auprc_delta_warm_mu_vs_vanilla,
      delta_pi_treat = .data$auprc_delta_pi,
      delta_pi_warm  = .data$auprc_delta_warm_pi_vs_vanilla
    )

  panel_C_long <- basin_long_pf %>%
    dplyr::left_join(auprc_lookup_pf, by = "dataset_bundle_id") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      auprc_delta = dplyr::case_when(
        chain == "mu" & pair_kind == "cold_ann"  ~ delta_mu_treat,
        chain == "mu" & pair_kind == "cold_warm" ~ delta_mu_warm,
        chain == "pi" & pair_kind == "cold_ann"  ~ delta_pi_treat,
        chain == "pi" & pair_kind == "cold_warm" ~ delta_pi_warm
      ),
      drift_bucket = cut(
        basin_drift,
        breaks = c(-Inf, 0.05, 0.10, Inf),
        labels = c("low (<0.05)", "mid (0.05-0.10)", "high (>=0.10)"),
        right = FALSE
      ),
      chain = factor(chain, levels = c("mu", "pi")),
      pair_kind = factor(
        pair_kind,
        levels = c("cold_ann", "cold_warm"),
        labels = c("cold -> annotated", "cold -> vanilla_warm")
      )
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(is.finite(.data$auprc_delta), !is.na(.data$drift_bucket))

  # Per-cell counts for n=X annotations above each box.
  bucket_counts <- panel_C_long %>%
    dplyr::count(.data$chain, .data$pair_kind, .data$drift_bucket)
  y_top <- max(panel_C_long$auprc_delta, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.08

  panel_C <- ggplot(
    panel_C_long,
    aes(x = .data$drift_bucket,
        y = .data$auprc_delta,
        fill = .data$drift_bucket)
  ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey45", linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.65, outlier.size = 0.6, width = 0.65) +
    geom_text(
      data = bucket_counts,
      aes(x = .data$drift_bucket, y = y_top,
          label = sprintf("n=%d", .data$n)),
      inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 3.0, color = "grey25"
    ) +
    facet_grid(
      chain ~ pair_kind,
      labeller = labeller(chain = chain_labeller,
                          pair_kind = pair_kind_labeller)
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(
      "low (<0.05)"     = "#878787",
      "mid (0.05-0.10)" = "#fd8d3c",
      "high (>=0.10)"   = "#a50f15"
    )) +
    labs(
      x = "Basin drift bucket",
      y = expr_dauprc,
      fill = "Basin drift",
      title = "C. ΔAUPRC by basin-drift bucket (3-bucket cut at 0.05 / 0.10)"
    ) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 11),
          legend.position = "right",
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5))

  # ============================================================
  # PANEL D. Per-effect (K_l, A_l) density shifts: 2 x 2
  #          rows = chain (mu, pi); cols = (cold->ann, cold->warm)
  # ============================================================
  panel_D_df <- density_shift_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(.data$comparison_kind %in% c(
      "vanilla_to_treatment", "vanilla_to_warm"
    )) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      comparison_kind = factor(
        .data$comparison_kind,
        levels = c("vanilla_to_treatment", "vanilla_to_warm"),
        labels = c("cold -> annotated", "cold -> vanilla_warm")
      ),
      chain = factor(.data$chain, levels = c("mu", "pi"))
    )

  panel_D <- ggplot(panel_D_df,
                    aes(x = .data$x, y = .data$y,
                        fill = .data$density_diff)) +
    geom_raster(interpolate = TRUE) +
    geom_contour(aes(z = .data$density_diff),
                 color = "grey20", alpha = 0.45, linewidth = 0.18) +
    facet_grid(
      chain ~ comparison_kind,
      labeller = labeller(chain = chain_labeller,
                          comparison_kind = pair_kind_labeller)
    ) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = "#2b6cb0", mid = "white", high = "#c53030",
      midpoint = 0, limits = c(-shared_fill_lim, shared_fill_lim),
      oob = scales::squish
    ) +
    keff_x_scale(xlim = x_limits_resolved) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = x_limits_resolved,
                    ylim = y_limits_resolved,
                    expand = FALSE) +
    labs(
      x = x_label, y = y_label,
      fill = "destination - source\n(PVE-weighted density)",
      title = "D. Per-effect quality shifts on the (Kℓ, Aℓ) plane"
    ) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 11),
          legend.position = "right")

  # ============================================================
  # Assemble
  # ============================================================
  combined_fig <- panel_A / panel_B / panel_C / panel_D +
    plot_layout(heights = c(0.58, 2.15, 1.0, 1.1)) &
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12))

  ggsave(
    paper_figure_png, combined_fig,
    width = 16.5, height = 22, dpi = 160, limitsize = FALSE
  )
  cat("Wrote combined paper figure to ", paper_figure_png, "\n", sep = "")
  print(combined_fig)
}
```

# 18. Outputs

```{r output-index}
outputs <- tibble::tibble(
  artifact = c(
    "per-effect drift assignments",
    "per-(dataset, pair) drift summary",
    "per-dataset AUPRC trajectory",
    "drift profile histograms",
    "chain AUPRC trajectory",
    "headline scatter (chord, diagnostic)",
    "headline scatter (basin drift)",
    "unpaired-count vs AUPRC delta scatter",
    "mu vs pi drift comparison: chord + JSD (diagnostic)",
    "mu vs pi drift comparison: basin drift + JSD (4-panel diagnostic)",
    "basin chord drift vs PIP JSD scatter (diagnostic)",
    "basin drift vs PIP JSD scatter (2x2 by chain x pair_kind)",
    "per-dataset PIP JSD summary",
    "master basin + PIP + AUPRC drift figure (chord, diagnostic)",
    "master basin + PIP + AUPRC drift figure (basin drift)",
    "effect-quality density pooled (mu)",
    "effect-quality density pooled (pi)",
    "effect-quality pair rows",
    "pooled PR curves top-K by |beta| (5 arms)",
    "pooled PR curve rows (csv)",
    "regenerated causal truth cache (idx + top-K)",
    "combined paper figure (4-panel headline, basin drift)"
  ),
  path = c(
    drift_assignments_csv,
    drift_summary_csv,
    auprc_per_dataset_csv,
    drift_profile_hist_png,
    chain_trajectory_png,
    headline_scatter_png,
    headline_scatter_r2_png,
    unpaired_vs_delta_png,
    mu_vs_pi_drift_png,
    mu_vs_pi_drift_r2_png,
    basin_vs_pip_jsd_chord_png,
    basin_vs_pip_jsd_r2_png,
    pip_drift_summary_csv,
    basin_pip_drift_png,
    basin_pip_drift_r2_png,
    effect_quality_density_mu_png,
    effect_quality_density_pi_png,
    effect_quality_pair_rows_csv,
    pr_curves_pooled_png,
    pr_curves_pooled_csv,
    causal_truth_rds,
    paper_figure_png
  )
)
kable(outputs)
```
